title: Gooey Brie Quesadilla
description: A deliciously gooey quesadilla filled with melted brie cheese. This dish is perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat a skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Butter one side of the quesadilla.
Place the quesadilla, buttered side down, in the skillet.
Sprinkle the brie cheese on half of the quesadilla.
Add the spicy cheese on top of the brie, if using.
Fold the quesadilla in half and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Cut into wedges and serve hot.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
